title: Carrier India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Carrier India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
We at Carrier India Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Carrier India Asia Pacific Associates:
Carrier India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Carrier India Asia Pacific Associates!
